# The BHive

> Brampton's business accelerator and innovation hub, home of BNext AI — a program helping established Ontario businesses adopt AI with evidence.

The BHive is a Brampton-based accelerator built with the City of Brampton in 2022. Its signature program, BNext AI, guides business owners and operators from AI curiosity to a working, governed AI workflow — vendor-neutral, evidence-first, and workflow-first.

## Program

- [BNext AI](/bnext-ai): The signature program — three starting points, one decision system.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): The six-stage method from problem to production candidate.
- [Start here](/start): Find the right starting point via a short readiness check.
- [New to AI](/start/new-to-ai): First-win route for owners exploring AI.
- [Experimenting](/start/experimenting): Turn scattered pilots into a validated use case.
- [Ready to implement](/start/ready-to-implement): Audit, test, and choose a rollout route.
- [Eligibility & FAQ](/eligibility): Program eligibility and common questions.
- [Apply](/apply): Program application (business brief).

## Library

- [AI in action](/ai-in-action): Representative use cases by function and sector.
- [Demos](/demos): Narrated workflow demos.
- [Field guides](/field-guides): Worksheets, checklists, and playbooks.
- [Insights](/insights): Decision notes and signals from the field.
- [Stories](/stories): Participant workflow stories.
- [BNext Signal](/signal): Weekly one-decision newsletter.
- [Events](/events): Cohort events, clinics, and peer exchanges.

## The BHive

- [About](/about): Institutional story and mission.
- [Team & advisors](/team): Who supports which decisions.
- [Partners](/partners): Referral partners and how referrals work.
- [Vendor network](/vendor-network): Vendor matching rules.
- [Contact](/contact): Program fit, partnership, media, accessibility.

- [Privacy](/privacy)
